query: I memoized every function in the UserDashboard component and added useMemo to all computed values. The page is still slow.
expected_behavior: Identifies that useMemo micro-optimization is P3 and does not address structural problems
Asks whether the slowness is in rendering (INP) or data loading (LCP/TTFB)
Recommends profiling the React DevTools Profiler or Network waterfall before adding more memoization
Suspects a structural problem: N+1 API calls, large unoptimized images, or synchronous work on render
Does not recommend adding more memoization as the next step
